creator: vince@vincentbentley.co.uk
text:
Yes, after spending a few hours on this I have come to the conclusion that this is one of those ports that has hard coded dependencies.

The gem extension for Kerberos is too tightly coupled to MIT and not sufficiently portable to be used with Heimdal without a lot of work.

The simplest fix for me is to build it in a jail with MIT Kerberos.

Sorry for taking up your time.
